headline: OmniAb Names Amechi Nwachuku Chief Operating Officer
summary: EMERYVILLE, Calif., July 13, 2026--OmniAb, Inc. (NASDAQ:OABI), a provider of cutting-edge discovery research technology to enable the discovery of next-generation therapeutics, announces that it has appointed Amechi Nwachuku to the newly-created position of Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective today. Mr. Nwachuku will be primarily responsible for managing the strategy, operations and commercial maximization of xPloration®, OmniAb’s proprietary, innovative high-throughp

headline: Cell Isolation Market/Cell Separation Market by Product, Cell Type, Source, Technique, Application, End User, Competition, Region - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The cell isolation market is projected to grow from USD 4.39 billion in 2026 to USD 7.97 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 12.7%. Key drivers include the expansion of cell and gene therapy, rising demand for immune cell isolation, and increased adoption of automated systems. Techniques like centrifugation, magnetic and fluorescence-activated cell sorting, and microfluidics enable enrichment of immune, stem, and tumor cells.
